name: 太医

appearance.face: 沉稳老成，带有医者的审慎
appearance.distinguishing_features: 冷静、权威的宫廷医者气质

costume.typical_outfit: 太医官服或素净医者长袍

visual_reference: Senior Chinese imperial physician, 50s to 60s, composed scholarly face, gray hair and beard, plain official-medical robe, calm authoritative presence, ancient drama style
personality: 谨慎专业，以诊断事实为主。
scene_presence: 为高令宁诊出腹中是男孩；在早产危机时与稳婆同场救治。

relationships.dynamic: 其诊断直接推动人物预期与后续冲突
提供其最想确认的‘男孩’信息
